Uses of Class
microui.core.base.Component

Packages that use Component
Package
Description
microui.component
 
microui.core
 
microui.core.base
 
microui.core.effect
 
microui.feedback
 

  • Uses of Component in microui.component

    Subclasses of Component in microui.component
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Button
    Represents a clickable button component with text and/or image content.
    class 
    CheckBox
    A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
    final class 
    Knob
    A circular knob control for selecting values within a range.
    final class 
    LabeledCheckBox
    A composite component that combines a CheckBox with a TextView to create a labeled checkbox.
    final class 
    MenuButton
    A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
    class 
    Scroll
    A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range.
    class 
    Slider
    A slider component for selecting values within a linear range.
    final class 
    TextArea
    A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.
    final class 
    TextField
    A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.
    final class 
    TextView
    A component for displaying text with automatic resizing, alignment, and clipping options.

  • Uses of Component in microui.core

    Subclasses of Component in microui.core
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractButton
    Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
    class 
    LinearRangeControl
    Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
    class 
    RangeControl
    Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.

  • Uses of Component in microui.core.base

    Subclasses of Component in microui.core.base
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    Container
    Container component for organizing and managing GUI components.
    Methods in microui.core.base that return Component
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Component
    Component.onClick(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for click events (press + release combination).
    final Component
    Component.onDoubleClick(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for double-click events (two rapid clicks).
    final Component
    Component.onDragEnd(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for drag end events (end of drag operation).
    final Component
    Component.onDragging(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for dragging events (continuous during drag).
    final Component
    Component.onDragStart(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for drag start events (beginning of drag operation).
    final Component
    Component.onEnter(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for mouse enter events (mouse enters component bounds).
    final Component
    Component.onEnterLong(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long enter events (extended hover).
    final Component
    Component.onHover(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for hover events (mouse over component).
    final Component
    Component.onLeave(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for mouse leave events (mouse leaves component bounds).
    final Component
    Component.onLeaveLong(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long leave events (mouse leaves after long hover).
    final Component
    Component.onLongPress(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long press events (extended mouse button hold).
    final Component
    Component.onPress(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for press events (mouse button down over component).
    final Component
    Component.onPressed(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for pressed state events (continuous while pressed).
    final Component
    Component.onRelease(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for release events (mouse button up after press).
    final Component
    Component.onReleased(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for released state events (continuous while released).
    final Component
    Component.setBackgroundColor(AbstractColor backgroundColor)
    Sets the background color of the component.
    final Component
    Component.setInteractionHandlerEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enables or disables the interaction handler for this component.
    final Component
    Component.setTooltip(String text)
    Sets a text tooltip for this component (convenience method).
    final Component
    Component.setTooltip(TooltipContent tooltipContent)
    Sets the tooltip content for this component.

  • Uses of Component in microui.core.effect

    Constructors in microui.core.effect with parameters of type Component
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Hover(Component component)
    Constructs a Hover effect for the specified component.
     
    Ripples(Component component)
    Constructs a Ripples effect for the specified component.

  • Uses of Component in microui.feedback

    Constructors in microui.feedback with parameters of type Component
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Tooltip(Component component)
    Constructs a Tooltip associated with the specified component.
